final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a 跨境电商 campaign.

Style/medium: needs a complex-yet-structured editorial poster aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include layered typography with product/hero subject physically overlapping and occluding some letterforms; overall composition must feel rich and dense but visually organized, not chaotic
Subject: must include a product or hero subject as the focal element that breaks in front of the type layers
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a promotional, high-energy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, attention-grabbing direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include decorative/artistic display lettering and stacked multi-layer typography (exact copy is yours — treat as design elements)
Constraints: must preserve all four structural rules: (1) artistic/display lettering present, (2) font stacking / layered type treatment, (3) complex but not cluttered composition, (4) product or subject occludes part of the type
Avoid: visual clutter, flat or monotonous layouts, uniform single-layer text treatment
